body:
## Summary

Fixes #1267 — four queue-related bugs reported after configurable queue thresholds feature (PR #1254):

- **Bug 1: Disk rejection not blocking queue placement** — Added explicit `check.rejected` handling in the `/solve` command handler. Previously, when disk usage exceeded 90% with `reject` strategy, items were still enqueued with a generic "Waiting in queue" message instead of being rejected outright. Also fixed `updateAllWaitingItems()` to use `rejectReason` field.

- **Bug 2: Missing "used" label on progress bars** — Changed below-threshold suffix from empty string to `' used'` on all 7 progress bar sections (CPU, RAM, Disk, GitHub API, Claude session, Claude weekly, Sonnet). Now shows `25% used` when below threshold, `95% ⚠️` when at/above.

- **Bug 3: Queue display not showing per-queue breakdown** — Rewrote `formatStatus()` and `formatDetailedStatus()` to iterate over all tool queues (claude, agent) and show each with pending/processing counts. Processing counts now come from actual system process detection (via `pgrep`) rather than queue internal state.

- **Bug 4: Queue items not grouped by tool, using raw seconds** — Added `formatDuration(ms)` utility for human-readable time (e.g., `5h 43m 23s`). Rewrote `formatDetailedStatus()` to group items by tool queue, show first 5 per queue, and display `... and N more` for overflow.

### Key fix in this update

Addressed feedback that "Claude processes" shown separately were actually queue processing items, not external processes. The queue display now shows:
```
Queues
claude (pending: 6, processing: 1)
agent (pending: 2, processing: 0)
```

Where `processing: 1` represents 1 actual claude process running in the system (detected via `pgrep`), not just queue internal state. Added `getRunningAgentProcesses()` for detecting agent processes similarly.

## Files Changed

| File | Changes |
|------|---------|
| `src/telegram-bot.mjs` | Added rejection handling in `/solve` command, updated `/limits` queue display (now async) |
| `src/telegram-solve-queue.lib.mjs` | Added `getRunningProcesses()`, `getRunningAgentProcesses()`, made `formatStatus()` and `formatDetailedStatus()` async with pgrep-based processing counts |
| `src/telegram-solve-queue-command.lib.mjs` | Updated `/solve_queue` to use async formatDetailedStatus, removed separate Claude processes line |
| `src/limits.lib.mjs` | Added "used" label on progress bars below threshold |
| `tests/solve-queue.test.mjs` | Updated tests for async formatStatus/formatDetailedStatus |
| `tests/test-solve-queue-command.mjs` | Updated tests for new format |
| `tests/test-queue-display-1267.mjs` | New: 10 tests for formatDuration, queue grouping, max 5 items, used label |
| `docs/case-studies/issue-1267/README.md` | Case study documentation |
| `.changeset/fix-queue-issues.md` | Changeset for version management |

## Test plan

- [x] All 10 new tests pass (formatDuration, queue display, used label)
- [x] All 70 existing queue tests pass (updated for async format methods)
- [x] All 22 solve_queue command tests pass
- [x] Full test suite passes
- [x] ESLint + Prettier checks pass
- [x] CI passes: all jobs green

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Fix queue issues: rejection, display, and formatting (#1267)
